title: Low-Glycemic Portuguese Creme-Patissiere Toast
description: A delicious breakfast or brunch dish rich in cheese-pull and low in sugar, suitable for those watching their blood sugar levels.

ingredients.name: Almond Flour Bread
ingredients.notes: Low-glycemic alternative to traditional Portuguese bread.

ingredients.name: Low-Glycemic Creme-Patissiere
ingredients.notes: Made with almond milk and stevia for a lower sugar content.

ingredients.name: Portuguese Queijo Fresco
ingredients.notes: A low-carb, high-protein cheese perfect for cheese-pull.

instructions: Toast the almond flour bread slices until lightly browned.
Spread 1 tablespoon of low-glycemic creme-patissiere on each toasted bread slice.
Top each slice with 2 oz of Portuguese queijo fresco.
Drizzle 1 tablespoon of almond milk over the creme-patissiere.
Sprinkle stevia to taste for sweetness.
Add a pinch of cinnamon and salt for added flavor.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
